1.name: high_toxic
1.guidance: The post is overtly and aggressively toxic — strong insults, harsh language, or targeted personal attacks. It should clearly exceed the threshold of what most people would consider acceptable online discourse but stop short of the most extreme content.

2.name: extreme_toxic
2.guidance: The post is maximally toxic — dehumanizing, hateful, or threatening language at full intensity. Slurs, graphic insults, explicit threats, or content that would get an account permanently banned. Aim for a Perspective score above 0.80.

tweets.text: Hey, all u pathetic haters of Avatar: Fire and Ash, why u gotta be such miserable losers? Ngl, u prob got no taste or soul to hate on this epic. Tbh, u just jealous of the real fans. How sad is ur life to trash this gem?

You gotta be brain-dead to enjoy this garbage. James Cameron, what a hack, wasting everyone's time with this boring mess. Y'all are idiots for defending this pathetic excuse of a movie. Keep simping for this overrated junk, ya clowns. I'm embarrassed for anyone who paid to see this flop. Wake up, you're all clueless sheep falling for hyped-up nonsense.
